description: A plain, undesigned candid photograph of a man, used in a tweet flagging a 'SEXUAL ASSAULT' charge against Phetsamone Senevilay, a Laotian national with a 2012 final removal order. The image shows a middle-aged man with short dark hair, a graying goatee/beard, and a flat expression, wearing a red jacket over a gray top, standing in what appears to be an institutional interior hallway (light walls, a doorway and ceiling visible behind him). It looks like an in-custody/processing snapshot. There is NO on-image text, no agency seal, no red crime-label banner, no nationality tag, and no graphic-design treatment or typography overlaid on this particular image file. On its own this asset is a bare candid/booking-style photo rather than the agency's stylized 'mugshot card' format; the captioning/crime-labeling lives only in the tweet text.
